steps.title: Test the choices in each equation
steps.content: Substitute each candidate into $y=5(x-3)$ and $y=(x-3)^2$. For $(8,25)$: $5(8-3)=25$ and $(8-3)^2=25$, so both equations hold.

steps.title: Identify the matching pair
steps.content: Only $(8,25)$ satisfies both equations simultaneously. That matches choice B — B is correct.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, compare the result from the work to the answer choices. The value, equation, or condition found above matches choice B, $(8, 25)$, and the other choices fail the same setup or substitution. Therefore B is correct.
